title: Holy Hand Grenade
description: A Mod that Adds Holy Hand Grenade From Doors April Fools Update
body:
Have You Ever Wanted The Holy Hand Grenade In Doors April Fools Update



Now It Has Come, I Made The MOD Called Holy Hand Grenade Which Adds New Grenade Item To The Game

The Mod Can Run In Servers But It Requires The Mod To Be Installed On The Client and Vice-Versa.




License: All Rights Reserved

And Make Sure To Subscribe To My Youtube Channel: https://www.youtube.com/@SlimeisNaughty

And I'm Running A New Tournament, Create An Application Below
